summary: Completed testing of X-CLEAN car wash management system bug fixes and new features. Backend APIs 80% successful, frontend UI fully functional with all requested features working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for service creation
minor_issues.impact: Minimal - services are created successfully, just different status code

passed_tests: Dashboard cash/card breakdown (today_cash, today_card, month_cash, month_card)
Day close endpoint /api/day-records/close with POST body (location, notes)
Service creation /api/services POST handling empty strings correctly
Job images update /api/jobs/{job_id} with images_before/images_after arrays
Workers page monthly calendar view toggle (Havi nézet/Heti nézet)
Day management page close day button functionality
Dashboard KPI cards showing proper cash/card breakdown
Navigation between pages (Dashboard, Workers, Services, Day Management)
Service creation form with proper handling of null/empty values
Workers calendar interface with monthly/weekly view switching
Day management interface with open/close day functionality
